title: Dybbuk Box: The Story of Chris Chambers
original_title: Dybbuk Box: True Story of Chris Chambers
overview: The encounters recorded by Chris Chambers have been studied by industry professionals and proven to be accurate recorded paranormal accounts. Currently documented as one of the most supernatural recorded events to date.
